...It's nostalgic. Back then, the four of us used to gather here to eat wild
strawberries... Those were fun times...

This place used to be a secret hideout that the adults didn't know about. We'd gather
here, hiding from the eyes of the village, and the four of us would play around until
sunset...

But one day, Mana and Dario got into a fight here, and then Mana stopped coming, and
Elly followed... In the end, everyone forgot all about this hideout.

Seeing these wild strawberries made me remember... why Mana and Dario fought...
...Dario's always been a boy without any tact, hasn't he?
現在天候のコモンイベント実行
完了までウェイト = true
...... Ah, why am I in a place like this...... How pitiful......

W-what's with that weird person standing in front of the assembly hall...... What are
they doing in this rain? Ah, that's suspicious... Should I call out to them......?
...Ah, I finally found you!...... ......-sama, come, let's go home......

What's with that person... It's weird to just be standing there spaced out like
that... That look, it seems like the soldiers were searching for them...?

W-well, whatever... I thought they were a suspicious person and got on guard, but the
soldiers took them away, so I'll leave the rest to them......

...Oh my, you are... My apologies, did I startle you? Though I may look like this, I
have no intention of harming humans.

I am a powerless, faint existence like a ghost. My flesh has rotted and decayed, yet
only hatred remains, seeping into this land like a curse...

...\n[1], there is one thing I want to tell you, from someone like me. Let me speak the
meaningless, bitter words of a loser who died without accomplishing anything.

...Why did you abandon my sister? Her end didn't have to be like this. We still had
means left to us...

...If you had found me, things would have been different. On that stormy night...
Powerless, I was merely here begging the king for forgiveness.

But you... With your strong connection to that person, you siblings could have surely
reached places I never could...

On a stormy night, deep into the night... If you had met me then, our paths would
surely have taken a different direction.

But now, it's already too late... I have already vanished from this world. So this is
just the grumbling of a loser...
You can take a shortcut to the mansion's second floor. Move there?
